title: Pinterest Q4 2023 Earnings Report
text: Pinterest shares dropped in extended trading after the company issued a weaker-than-expected forecast and reported disappointing revenue. Pinterest reported Q4 revenue of $1.32 billion, narrowly missing analyst expectations of $1.33 billion. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $0.67, falling short of the $0.69 consensus. Q1 2024 revenue guidance was projected between $951 million and $971 million, which trailed analyst estimates of $980 million. The company cited pressure on advertising demand, particularly from large retailers, and management said tariff-related costs weighed on advertising budgets in the U.S. and Canada, affecting cross-border campaigns in Europe. Management pointed to near-term disruption tied to changes in its go-to-market strategy for small and mid-sized advertisers. Pinterest shares slid more than 20% in premarket trading. After CEO Bill Ready announced a third-party app integration with Google, shares rebounded to a nearly 10% decline.
